rationale: Educ. Code §12.1056 governs tort and contract liability immunity for open-enrollment charter schools. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: In matters related to operation of an open-enrollment charter school, an open-enrollment charter school or charter holder is immune from liability and suit to the same extent as a school district
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns charter school liability immunity, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
